title: Hospital in Vashi, Navi Mumbai - Vinamra Swaraj Hospital
description: Vinamra Swaraj Hospital is a Multi-speciality hospital Located In Vashi, Navi Mumbai. Book appointment online for best hospital in Vashi, Navi Mumbai.

Keeping the future, and in addition changing patterns in Health-Care as a main priority, the Management set their sights on a greater test and along these lines, the 30 bedded Vinamra Swaraj Hospital was constructed. What We Do ? Our Vision To be known for delivering world-class service, care with compassion to each patient.
